好的，这是符合你要求的三段式格式：

---

nuke.title: Garage Smoke From T Spawn D
nuke.instructions:
Stand on the notch on the silo (see video for exact lineup)
Aim at the bottom-right corner of the first vent on top of Garage

nuke.title: Heaven Waterfall Smoke

aiming preview point

left jumper

nuke.title: Squeaky Smoke – Fast Door Vent Drop to B
nuke.instructions:

nuke.title: Ct Blue Box Smoke From Silo

Stand on the notch on the silo (see video for exact spot)

nuke.title: Close Diagonal Smoke For Secret From T Spawn 1

Aim at the bulb to the left of the right-side power pole

nuke.title: Ramp Smoke
nuke.instructions:
Line up between the second and third panel in Trophy Room
Aim at the top-left corner of the glass door
Run one step and left-click throw

nuke.title: Main Waterfall Smoke
nuke.instructions:
Hug the corner of the wall next to the blue door at T spawn.
Aim at the left bulb on the right utility pole, then move your crosshair slightly to the left.
Jump-throw with left-click.

nuke.title: Silo Yard Flash From A Default

nuke.title: Boost Ramp Flash

nuke.title: A Site Default Molotov From TRoof

nuke.title: Secret Molotov
